Name: USkeleton
Description:
USkeleton : that links between mesh and animation
 		- Bone hierarchy for animations
 		- Bonetrack linkup between mesh and animation
 		- Retargetting related
 		- Mirror table

Variables.Name: BoneTree
Variables.Description: Skeleton bone tree - each contains name and parent index

Variables.Name: RefLocalPoses_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Reference skeleton poses in local space

Variables.Name: VirtualBoneGuid
Variables.Description:
Guid for virtual bones.
	   Separate so that we don't have to dirty the original guid when only changing virtual bones

Variables.Name: VirtualBones
Variables.Description:
Array of this skeletons virtual bones. These are new bones are links between two existing bones
	  and are baked into all the skeletons animations

Variables.Name: CompatibleSkeletons
Variables.Description:
The list of compatible skeletons.
	  This is an array of TSoftObjectPtr in order to prevent all skeletons to be loaded, as we only want to load things on demand.
	  As this is EditAnywhere and an array of TSoftObjectPtr, checking validity of pointers is needed.

Variables.Name: CustomSkeletonNameMap
Variables.Description: key名称对应其他骨骼的名字 做骨骼兼容时 会被当作本骨骼的value使用

Variables.Name: SkeletonNotOffsetName
Variables.Description: 是否要在骨骼兼容后不应用offset

Variables.Name: RefBoneNames
Variables.Description: 该名称对应的骨骼 做骨骼兼容时 只会应用旋转

Variables.Name: ExcludeBoneInfos
Variables.Description: 该名称对应的骨骼 做骨骼兼容时排除该骨骼的信息

Variables.Name: Sockets
Variables.Description:
Array of named socket locations, set up in editor and used as a shortcut instead of specifying 
	 	everything explicitly to AttachComponent in the SkeletalMeshComponent.

Variables.Name: BlendProfiles
Variables.Description: List of blend profiles available in this skeleton

Variables.Name: AssetUserData
Variables.Description: Array of user data stored with the asset

Variables.Name: bSkipGenerateGuidWhenSkeletonHierarchyAdd
Variables.Description: 当骨架增加骨骼时，跳过 Guid 更新和 DDC 重新构建

Variables.Name: PreviewSkeletalMesh
Variables.Description: The default skeletal mesh to use when previewing this skeleton

Variables.Name: AdditionalPreviewSkeletalMeshes
Variables.Description: The additional skeletal meshes to use when previewing this skeleton

Variables.Name: AnimationNotifies
Variables.Description: AnimNotifiers that has been created. Right now there is no delete step for this, but in the future we'll supply delete

Variables.Name: PreviewAttachedAssetContainer
Variables.Description: Attached assets component for this skeleton
